$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.1 — patch: fixes the provision wizard's remote-site baseline (no more silent HTTP 400 at Apply). The Review step now catches a missing Remote-Access prerequisite, and API errors surface their reason. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
